name: Shandong Polymer Biochemicals Co., Ltd.
summary: Shandong Polymer Biochemicals Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, produces and sells oilfield chemicals in China and internationally. The company offers monomers, surfactants, and polymers. It is also involved in oil and gas engineering technology services; oil and gas exploration and development; and environmental water treatment businesses. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Dongying, China.
